title: jacobaea borysthenica
intro: Jacobaea borysthenica, also known as Dalmatian thistle or Russian knapweed, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Jacobaea borysthenica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatic pains, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Jacobaea borysthenica can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
